basic_details.job_title: NABARD Bank's Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)
basic_details.short_information: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website nabard.org. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NABARD Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree in allopathic system of medicine recognized by Medical Council of India, Post graduate degree in General medicine, Minimum 2 years experience in any hospital or clinic as Medical Practitioner
qualification.details: MBBS degree in the allopathic system of medicine of any university recognized by the Medical Council of India. Minimum 2 years experience as Medical Practitioner.

salary_details.details: ₹1000/- per hour for the first 3 years and ₹1200/- per hour thereafter, plus ₹1000/- per month conveyance and mobile reimbursement.

selection_process: Interview Medical Fitness Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABARD Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NABARD Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NABARD Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABARD BMO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NABARD Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) position is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the BMO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a Medical Council of India recognized institution and have at least 2 years of experience as a Medical Practitioner. A postgraduate degree in General Medicine is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) position is 70 years. There are no minimum age restrictions specified for this role.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NABARD BMO post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the BMO position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) is Rs. 1000 per hour for the first three years, and Rs. 1200 per hour thereafter. Additionally, a monthly conveyance and mobile reimbursement of Rs. 1000 is provided.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the BMO role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NABARD BMO recruitment includes an Interview, a Medical Fitness Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply through the offline mode. This involves downloading the application form, filling it, and sending it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD).

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Bank's Medical Officer (BMO) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official NABARD website.
